svg.title: Greek Language Understanding Accuracy
svg.desc: Accuracy on 108 Greek language-understanding tasks for DeepSeek V4 Flash, DeepSeek V4 Pro, and Gemma 4 31B IT Nitro.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: Accuracy on 108 messy Greek, Greeklish, mixed-script, and non-standard Greek tasks.
